name: TextReveal

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to reveal, split on whitespace into individually-animated words.

parameters.name: Stagger
parameters.description: Delay in milliseconds added per word index, so later words reveal after earlier ones. Default 80.

parameters.name: Threshold
parameters.description: Fraction of the element that must be visible in the viewport before the reveal triggers, passed to the underlying IntersectionObserver. Clamped to [0, 1]. Default 0.3.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root <span>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root <span>.

examples.title: Default Reveal
examples.code: <TextReveal Text="Build beautiful Blazor UIs faster than ever before." Class="text-2xl font-semibold" />

examples.title: Fast Stagger
examples.code: <TextReveal Text="Every word fades in at lightning speed with Stagger set to 40ms." Stagger="40" Class="text-xl font-medium" />

examples.title: Slow Stagger
examples.code: <TextReveal Text="Each word takes its time revealing the message one by one." Stagger="180" Class="text-xl font-medium" />

examples.title: Hero Heading
examples.code:
<TextReveal Text="The Blazor component library designed for modern applications."
             Class="text-3xl font-bold leading-tight" Stagger="80" />

mdSummary:
# TextReveal

Word-by-word reveal animation on scroll.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/text-reveal

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TextReveal | Text | `string` | `string.Empty` | The text to reveal, split on whitespace into individually-animated words. |
| TextReveal | Stagger | `int` | `80` | Delay in milliseconds added per word index, so later words reveal after earlier ones. Default 80. |
| TextReveal | Threshold | `double` | `0.3` | Fraction of the element that must be visible in the viewport before the reveal triggers, passed to the underlying IntersectionObserver. Clamped to [0, 1]. Default 0.3. |
| TextReveal | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root <span>. |
| TextReveal | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root <span>. |

## Slots
- (none)

- (none)

- (none)

- (none)

